scenarios.description: Full boot transfer requires core/physiology plus memory/state or verified SHA-256 pointer.
Memory-only package is not a boot package.
Cycle Guard preflight includes number, mode, detail, source boundary, package role, debts, and Versions.
Author support triggers for first greeting, physiology archive, #50 transition, and downloadable BOIS product.
Material operator questions are asked before calculation and are not mixed with debts.
QA-E field effectiveness is not claimed.
